sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ الْمُوَظَّفُونَ فِي هَذِهِ الشَّرِكَةِ كَفَرِيقٍ وَاحِدٍ.
sentences.translation: Zaposlenici u ovoj firmi rade kao jedan tim.
sentences.translationEn: The employees in this company work as one team.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَاوَنُ الْجَمِيعُ لِتَحْقِيقِ الْأَهْدَافِ الْمَطْلُوبَةِ فِي الْوَقْتِ الْمُحَدَّدِ.
sentences.translation: Svi sarađuju kako bi postigli tražene ciljeve na vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone cooperates to achieve the required goals on time.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ الْخُبَرَاءُ زُمَلَاءَهُمُ الْجُدُدَ فِي تَعَلُّمِ الْمَهَامِ الْفَنِّيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Stručnjaci pomažu svojim novim kolegama u učenju tehničkih zadataka.
sentences.translationEn: Experts help their new colleagues learn technical tasks.
